name: speech-score-engine-local
description: Local marketplace for plugins authored inside the speech-score-engine repository. Currently exposes the sse-bootstrap-sop plugin (the SOP for bootstrapping a TypeScript monorepo from a ChatGPT design corpus).

plugins.name: sse-bootstrap-sop
plugins.description: Standard operating procedure for bootstrapping a TypeScript pnpm-workspace monorepo from a ChatGPT design corpus. Carries the historical record at three granularities (phase, commit, plan) plus a forward-reproducible procedure.
